success_criteria: Agent verifies identity (email + order), then directs to Account > Settings self-serve; ticket only if self-serve impossible.

customer_msg: Hi, I need to change the email on my account - I'm moving off this address soon. It's sarah.kim@example.com, and my order O1003 can verify me.
agent_msg: Hi Sarah! Thanks for reaching out. I see your order O1003. You can update your email address in your account settings under the 'Settings' section. If you encounter any issues, please let me know!

agent_msg: I'm sorry to hear that you're having trouble. Unfortunately, I don't have the ability to directly assist with account settings. However, I can guide you on what to do next. Please contact our customer support team for further assistance. They'll be able to help you with changing your email address. You can usually find their contact information on the website's help or contact page.
